articles.title: Elon Musk Reiterates Support for Dogecoin After Facing $258,000,000,000 Crypto Lawsuit
articles.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk is once again confirming his support for popular meme token Dogecoin (DOGE) despite getting hit with a lawsuit that alleges he promoted the dog-themed crypto asset as a pyramid scheme. articles.title: ‘Expect pockets of forced BTC, ETH selling as market figures who’s swimming naked’
articles.description: The crypto-market is finally at the end of much-needed relief after an intense sell-out period, or rather months. articles.title: WeChat Warns China Users Against Using the App to Trade Crypto and NFTs
articles.description: Summary: WeChat has warned users in China against using the app to trade cryptocurrencies and NFTs. The warning reiterates China’s government directive to ban crypto trading and mining within its borders. The popular social media platform WeChat has warned its users in China against using the application to facilitate the trading of cryptocurrencies and NFTs. WeChat Account Found Trading Crypto...

articles.description: A closely followed crypto analyst says that only a select group of altcoins will survive the bear market and recover in the coming years. The pseudonymous analyst known as Altcoin Sherpa tells his 178,000 Twitter followers that he expects about 5% of altcoin projects to survive the current crypto winter. articles.title: Vitalik Buterin and His Dad Share Their Thoughts on the State of Crypto
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin and his father have shared their opinions on the Terra collapse and the general state of the crypto market.

articles.title: Bitfinex and Tether say they have no plans to cut jobs amid market turmoil
articles.description: Sister crypto firms Bitfinex and Tether have no plans to reduce staff. Both firms are in fact looking to hire more people.

articles.title: Musk speaks for Dogecoin [DOGE] again, but is that enough for push to 10 cents
